resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def subtractProductAndSum(self, n: int) -> int:
        product = 1
        total = 0
        for digit in str(n):
            product *= int(digit)
            total += int(digit)
        return product - total
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates over each digit in the input number, calculating the product and sum of the digits. The time complexity is O(log n) because the number of digits in the input number is proportional to the logarithm of the number.
